subject: [PATCH v5 2/4] mm/zsmalloc: drop pool->lock from zs_free on 64-bit systems

reviews.author: Nhat Pham
reviews.summary: Raised concern about naming conventions, suggested using get_and_lock_obj_class() or obj_class_get_and_lock(), citing precedent in swap_cluster_get_and_lock().

2026-06-24.patch_summary: Proposal to drop pool->lock from zs_free on 64-bit systems, with suggested alternative function names.

reviews.author: Barry Song
reviews.summary: Agreed with the proposed change, suggesting it sounds better with alternative function names.
reviews.raw_body:
On Thu, Jun 25, 2026 at 6:39 AM Nhat Pham <nphamcs@gmail.com> wrote:
[...]
>
> get_and_lock_obj_class()? :)
>
> or obj_class_get_and_lock()? - there's swap_cluster_get_and_lock() as
> the precedent.

Nice, that sounds much better to me.

>
> Anyway naming is hard.

Best Regards
Barry

2026-06-25.patch_summary: Proposal to drop pool->lock from zs_free on 64-bit systems, with suggested alternative function names.
